title: Gemini visual review S02 panel a1

payload.notes: Gemini auto-gemini-3 VISUAL review of S02_panel_a01.png, mode=baked。三人身份在像素风格下保持稳定：左侧 researcher（黑框眼镜+深色短发+黑 T）与右侧 ARIS duo（蓝衣 executor 棕发无须高跳、绿衣 reviewer 黑发有须抱臂落定）均与 trio_identity_sheet/duo_canonical_ref 一致，identity_consistency=5。warm-left/dark-cyber-right 双世界沿笔电屏幕对角分割（ART_BIBLE §0.5 seam），暖色 Edison 灯与 #0A0E27 霓虹网格配色统一，style_consistency=5。构图可读、视线导向清晰（researcher 起身 → 骑缝 terminal card → duo 觉醒），composition_readability=5。无肢体崩坏/融合/边缘粒子伪影，artifact_severity=0。本稿为 baked-duo：baked CJK 气泡与英文技术字面清晰可读、拼写正确，baked_text_quality=5；观察到的字面文本 observed_literals=["$ aris run", "--task dllm-schema-keyword-first", "--deadline 24h", "ARIS ONLINE", "T-24:00:00", "ML RESEARCH", "submit / sleep", "session started"]，与 B02 hand-off 语境一致，content_corruption_present=false。安全区保留（safezone_present=true）；无游离的 HTML-冲突字形 stray_text_present=false。[transcribed from gemini auto-gemini-3 CLI read, RC=0]
